---
title: "SFig 18"
author: "SK"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::robobook:
    highlight: kate
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(reshape2)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(cellmig)
dir.create("manuscript_dataset_2")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```


# Load Dataset 2

```{r}
# constants
ds <- c("0.5", "1", "2.5", "5", "10", "40", "DMSO")

# load data
d <- get(load("data/dataset_2.RData"))
d$dose <- factor(x = d$dose, levels = ds)
```


# Load cellmig results for Dataset 2

```{r}
o <- get(load("results/cellmig_dataset_2.RData"))
```


# Posterior predictive check (PPC)

```{r, fig.width=3.5, fig.height=3}
g_ppc <- cellmig::get_ppc_means(x = o)
g_ppc

y <- aggregate(v~well_id, data = o$data$proc_x, FUN = mean)
q <- o$posteriors$well_mu
y <- merge(x = y, y = q, by = "well_id")

g_ppc_well <- ggplot(data = y)+
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed")+
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = v, y = mean, ymin = X2.5., ymax = X97.5.), col = "darkgray")+
  geom_point(aes(x = v, y = mean), shape = 21, fill = "white", size = 1, stroke = 0.3, alpha = 0.85)+
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
  xlab(label = "Observed mean well velocity")+
  ylab(label = "Predicted mean well velocity + 95% HDI")+
  scale_x_log10()+
  scale_y_log10()+
  annotation_logticks(base = 10, sides = "lb")
g_ppc_well
```


```{r, fig.width=3.5, fig.height=2}
u <- o$posteriors$alpha_p

g_alpha_p <- ggplot(data = u)+
  geom_point(aes(x = mean, y = plate_id))+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(x = mean, xmin = X2.5., xmax = X97.5., 
                     y = plate_id), height = 0.1)+
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
  theme(legend.position = "top")+
  ylab(label = "Plate")+
  xlab(label = expression(alpha[p]))

g_exp_alpha_p <- ggplot(data = u)+
  geom_point(aes(x = exp(mean), y = plate_id))+
  geom_errorbarh(aes(x = exp(mean), xmin = exp(X2.5.), xmax = exp(X97.5.), 
                     y = plate_id), height = 0.1)+
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
  theme(legend.position = "top")+
  ylab(label = "Plate")+
  xlab(label = expression(exp(alpha[p])))

g_alpha <- g_alpha_p|g_exp_alpha_p
```


```{r, fig.width=4, fig.height=2}
g_kappa_mu <- ggplot()+
  geom_point(data = o$posteriors$kappa_mu, aes(y = "", x = mean))+
  geom_errorbarh(data = o$posteriors$kappa_mu, 
                 aes(x = mean, xmin = X2.5., xmax = X97.5., 
                     y = ""), height = 0.1)+
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
  xlab(label = 'parameter value (mean + 95% HDI)')+
  ylab(label = expression(kappa[mu]))

g_kappa_sigma <- ggplot()+
  geom_point(data = o$posteriors$kappa_sigma, aes(y = "", x = mean))+
  geom_errorbarh(data = o$posteriors$kappa_sigma, 
                 aes(x = mean, xmin = X2.5., xmax = X97.5., 
                     y = ""), height = 0.1)+
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
  xlab(label = 'parameter value (mean + 95% HDI)')+
  ylab(label = expression(kappa[sigma]))

g_kappa <- g_kappa_mu/g_kappa_sigma
g_kappa
```


```{r, fig.width=4, fig.height=3}
g_sigma_bio <- ggplot()+
  geom_point(data = o$posteriors$sigma_bio, aes(y = "", x = mean))+
  geom_errorbarh(data = o$posteriors$sigma_bio,
                 aes(x = mean, xmin = X2.5., xmax = X97.5., 
                     y = ""), height = 0.1)+
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
  ylab(label = 'par')+
  xlab(label = 'parameter value (mean + 95% HDI)')+
  ylab(label = expression(sigma[bio]))

g_sigma_tech <- ggplot()+
  geom_point(data = o$posteriors$sigma_tech, aes(y = "", x = mean))+
  geom_errorbarh(data = o$posteriors$sigma_tech,
                 aes(x = mean, xmin = X2.5., xmax = X97.5., 
                     y = ""), height = 0.1)+
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
  xlab(label = 'parameter value (mean + 95% HDI)')+
  ylab(label = expression(sigma[tech]))

g_sigma_delta <- ggplot()+
  geom_point(data = o$posteriors$sigma_delta, aes(y = "", x = mean))+
  geom_errorbarh(data = o$posteriors$sigma_delta,
                 aes(x = mean, xmin = X2.5., xmax = X97.5., 
                     y = ""), height = 0.1)+
  theme_bw(base_size = 10)+
  xlab(label = 'parameter value (mean + 95% HDI)')+
  ylab(label = expression(sigma[delta]))

g_sigma <- g_sigma_bio/g_sigma_tech/g_sigma_delta
```


```{r}
g <- (g_kappa_mu/g_kappa_sigma/g_sigma_bio/g_sigma_tech/g_sigma_delta)
```



```{r, fig.width=9, fig.height=3.6}
g <- (g)|(g_alpha)|(g_ppc_well)
g
```


```{r}
ggsave(filename = "manuscript_dataset_2/Supplementary_parameters_dataset_2.pdf",
       plot = g,
       device = "pdf",
       width = 9,
       height = 3.5)
```
